entries.title: Compare any two games head-to-head
entries.body: Hit '⇌ Compare' in the Games toolbar, then tap two games to see them matched across hours, rating, cost-per-hour, ROI, sessions, and price — with animated bars, a trophy for each winner, and an overall verdict. Finally answer 'was Game X or Game Y the better investment?'

entries.title: Gaming Goals now live in your Stats
entries.body: Set personal gaming goals — complete N games, log X hours, stay under a spending limit — and track your live progress right inside the Stats tab. Goals auto-update based on your real data as you play.

entries.title: Search your library instantly
entries.body: A search bar now lives at the top of the Games tab. Type a game name, genre, or platform and your list narrows in real time. Works great when you have a big library and just want to find that one game quickly.

entries.title: Updates live here now
entries.body: This is the new What's New panel. When the app changes, you'll see a friendly summary here so you always know what's different.
